recommendations.title: 10 Rules for Falling in Love
recommendations.overview: Womanizer father teaches clumsy son the decalogue of seduction: ten foolproof rules to make any woman fall in love. But the results will be not what expected.

recommendations.title: ...It's Snowing Outside!
recommendations.overview: After their mother dies, three brothers must live together in order to get their inheritance — and soon start to uncover dark family secrets.

recommendations.title: Una festa esagerata
recommendations.overview: Mirea is about to be 18 years old, and her family is prepearing a big party for her. Teresa, Mirea's mother, wants to gain notoriety, so begins to spend recklessy for the celebration. When the day finally comes, an unexpected death puts it at risk.

recommendations.title: SMS: Sotto Mentite Spoglie
recommendations.overview: A married man with two children, faithful and in love with his wife,  discovers that his wife would like to spice up the menage a little. He plays along and starts texting her as if he were his lover.

recommendations.title: Three Perfect Daughters
recommendations.overview: Three families go into crisis when their daughters get engaged because they are convinced that their young daughters have all chosen a wrong partner.

recommendations.title: Mamma Mia!
recommendations.overview: A spirited young bride-to-be living with her single mother on a small Greek island secretly invites three of her mother's ex-boyfriends in hope of finding her biological father to walk her down the aisle.

recommendations.title: Two Is a Family
recommendations.overview: A man without attachments or responsibilities suddenly finds himself with an abandoned baby and leaves for London to try and find the mother. Eight years later after he and his daughter become inseparable Gloria's mother reappears.

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: Bruno's plan to win back his ex-girlfriend hits a snag when he becomes attracted to her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Schweinskopf al dente
recommendations.overview: As he tries to win back his ex-girlfriend, a lethargic Lower Bavarian police officer gets sidetracked by a panicky boss and an escaped psychopath.

recommendations.title: Happy Gilmore 2
recommendations.overview: Happy Gilmore isn't done with golf — not by a long shot. Since his retirement after his first Tour Championship win, Gilmore returns to finance his daughter's ballet classes.
